message:
test(oracle): add 10 conformance tests (450 total): multi-table updates, GROUP_CONCAT, three-table joins, numeric edges

New test suites: multi-table UPDATE with correlated subquery, GROUP_CONCAT
with separators and DISTINCT, scalar subqueries in SELECT list, IN clause
variants (literal/subquery/NULL/combined), complex expression eval (nested
functions, string ops, hex/unicode), aggregate DISTINCT with NULLs,
three-table INNER/LEFT JOIN with aggregates, nested subquery positions
(WHERE/HAVING/EXISTS/NOT IN/CASE), string function edges (empty/NULL/negative
substr/replace/trim), numeric edge cases (boundaries/div-by-zero/round/modulo).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
